  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The user asked to 'Polish this,' making sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and concision the load-bearing responsibility without altering meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should transparently preserve and not obscure any uncertainty already present in the text.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid strengthening or diluting claims beyond the author's intent to prevent overclaiming.",
    "RX.3": "The scope is limited to stylistic polish, not conceptual reframing, reorganization, or methodological changes.",
    "RX.4": "Wording should avoid introducing harmful framings or misrepresentations of participants and practices.",
    "RX.5": "Edits must maintain fidelity to the provided artifact so the provenance of all content remains clear."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The user asked to 'Polish this,' making sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and concision the load-bearing responsibility without altering meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should transparently preserve and not obscure any uncertainty already present in the text.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid strengthening or diluting claims beyond the author's intent to prevent overclaiming.
rationale.RX.3: The scope is limited to stylistic polish, not conceptual reframing, reorganization, or methodological changes.
rationale.RX.4: Wording should avoid introducing harmful framings or misrepresentations of participants and practices.
rationale.RX.5: Edits must maintain fidelity to the provided artifact so the provenance of all content remains clear.
